essential_assertions.text: assert forall|ii: int, jj: int| 0 <= ii <= jj < ps.len() implies #[trigger] or_of_seq(ps.subrange(ii, jj + 1)) >= jj - ii + 1 by { let sub = ps.subrange(ii, jj + 1); assert(sub.len() == jj - ii + 1);

placeholders.original_text: assert forall|ii: int, jj: int| 0 <= ii <= jj < ps.len() implies #[trigger] or_of_seq(ps.subrange(ii, jj + 1)) >= jj - ii + 1 by { let sub = ps.subrange(ii, jj + 1); assert(sub.len() == jj - ii + 1); assert(sub.len() > 0); assert forall|k: int| 0 <= k < sub.len() implies sub[k] >= 0 by { assert(sub[k] == ps[ii + k]); }; // sub[jj - ii] == ps[jj] == jj + 1 >= jj - ii + 1 (since ii >= 0) assert(sub[jj - ii] == ps[jj]); assert(ps[jj] == jj + 1); assert(sub[jj - ii] == jj + 1); assert(jj + 1 >= jj - ii + 1); or_of_seq_geq_element(sub, jj - ii); }; }
